scene.voice: From the entry, the home opens into a bright dining area with clean sight lines.
This flexible front room can serve as formal dining, an office, or a quiet sitting space.
The kitchen centers on the island, with open counter space and an easy working layout.
A wider angle shows the cabinetry, appliances, and the main cooking zone in context.
The living area connects directly from the kitchen, keeping the main spaces open and easy to follow.
The fireplace anchors the seating area, giving this room a clear and comfortable focal point.

outro.voice: Reach out to schedule a private tour.
